steps.title: Add the five values
steps.content: Sum the masses: $3920,3920,3140,3960,3160$, giving a total of $18100$.

steps.title: Divide by the count
steps.content: The mean is $$\tfrac{18100}{5}=3620.$$ The answer is 3620.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $3620$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $3620$.
